agents.purpose: Detect failed or missing CI, new issues, divergence, stale provenance, and release metadata contradictions.
Classify failing jobs, identify deterministic causes, and prepare bounded repair branches.
Prevent self-stale candidate SHAs and require evidence to name the reviewed baseline separately from the current candidate.
Inventory runtimes, package managers, lockfiles, dependencies, and unsupported version ranges.
Contain mutable-state writers, preserve evidence, enforce single-writer locking, and track incident closure criteria.
Compute release eligibility only from exact-head CI, accepted review state, provenance, security, and rollback evidence.
Route findings to the correct agent, deduplicate work, keep one canonical repair path, and close alerts after verified recovery.
